name: GitHub User
description: A GitHub user account representing an individual, organization, or bot that interacts with repositories, issues, and other resources.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

node_id.description: The GraphQL node ID for the user.

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

gravatar_id.description: The Gravatar ID associated with the user's email.

url.description: The API URL for the user.

html_url.description: URL to the user's GitHub profile.

followers_url.description: API URL for the user's followers.

following_url.description: API URL template for who the user is following.

gists_url.description: API URL template for the user's gists.

repos_url.description: API URL for the user's repositories.

site_admin.description: Whether the user is a GitHub site administrator.

name.description: The display name of the user.

company.description: The company the user is associated with.

blog.description: The user's blog or website URL.

email.description: The user's publicly visible email address.

hireable.description: Whether the user has indicated they are available for hire.

public_repos.description: The number of public repositories the user owns.

public_gists.description: The number of public gists the user has created.

followers.description: The number of followers the user has.

following.description: The number of users the user is following.

created_at.description: The date and time the user account was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the user account was last updated.

two_factor_authentication.description: Whether the user has two-factor authentication enabled. Only visible for the authenticated user.
